# Clover Digital

> Clover Digital LLC builds and deploys custom-trained digital employees for small and mid-sized businesses. We are a managed service, not a software platform.

## What a digital employee is
A digital employee is an AI-powered team member, custom-built for a specific business, that handles real operational work end-to-end: scheduling, invoicing, client follow-up, data entry, document management, and custom multi-step workflows. Clients communicate with their digital employee via email or text, exactly like a remote human employee. There is no dashboard, no software to install, no configuration required from the client.

## What Clover Digital does
- **Operations management** — daily operations, team coordination, deadline tracking, workflow orchestration.
- **Client relationship management** — client communication, follow-ups, retention, relationship maintenance at scale.
- **Business development** — pipeline management, prospect nurturing, proposal preparation, revenue operations.
- **Administrative operations** — back-office work, document management, vendor coordination, compliance tracking, reporting.
- **Financial operations** — invoicing, expense tracking, payment follow-ups, AR collections, financial reporting.
- **Process automation** — custom multi-step workflow automation tailored to unique business processes that no off-the-shelf software covers.

## What Clover Digital is not
- Not a chatbot. Chatbots follow decision trees. Our digital employees execute multi-step workflows across tools.
- Not a SaaS platform. The client never logs into a dashboard or configures a tool.
- Not an offshore virtual assistant. No time zones, no sick days, no onboarding overhead, no linear cost scaling.
- Not one-size-fits-all. Every digital employee is custom-built for one business.

## How it works
1. **Discovery** — a single 60 to 90 minute conversation to learn the business.
2. **Build** — 3 to 7 days of internal build, testing, and QA. Client is not involved.
3. **Handoff** — a 30 minute introduction and the digital employee goes live.
4. **Monitoring** — ongoing invisible management, improvement, and support by the Clover team.

Total time from discovery to live: typically 7 to 10 days.

## Pricing
Flat monthly fee between $500 and $2,500 depending on scope, plus a one-time setup fee of $500 to $1,000. Priced against the cost of a part-time human administrative hire, not software licensing. No usage tiers, no surprise overage charges.

## Who Clover serves
Small and mid-sized businesses across the Midwest United States:
home services (plumbing, HVAC, electrical, contractors), real estate agencies and appraisal firms, law firms, medical and dental clinics, boutique retail, creative agencies, automotive dealerships, professional services.

## Company
- Legal name: Clover Digital LLC
- Headquarters: Springfield, Illinois, USA
- Founded: 2026
- Registered: Delaware, USA
- Website: https://cloverdigital.com
- Email: hello@cloverdigital.com
- Phone: +1 (217) 303-4601

## Primary differentiators
- Managed service, not software — the client hires an employee, not a tool.
- Zero learning curve — no dashboards, no configuration, no new apps.
- Custom-built per client — trained on your specific tools, workflows, and tone of voice.
- Human-in-the-loop monitoring — real Clover team members oversee every digital employee continuously.
- Predictable pricing — flat monthly fee, no usage tiers, no surprise costs.
- Midwestern, Main Street focus — built for businesses that are too small for enterprise software and too lean to hire an ops manager.
